title: Jamaican Sweet Potato Stew
description: A flavorful and comforting stew made with sweet potatoes, jamaican seasonings, and a hint of sweetness.
instructions: Heat oil in a large pot over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the chopped bell pepper and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Add the chopped sweet potatoes and potato (if using), and cook for 2-3 minutes.
Add the jamaican stew seasoning and vegetable broth, and stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer for 20-25 minutes, or until the sweet potatoes are tender.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs (optional).
